This is a vendored copy of LeRobot with minor modifications.

Upstream: https://github.com/huggingface/lerobot
Base commit: 483be9aa (2025-06-30)
License: Apache-2.0

Changes from upstream:

1. lerobot/common/datasets/transforms.py
   - Added 3 new image transform configs (all disabled by default with weight=0.0):
     - rotation: RandomRotation (degrees: -15 to 15)
     - affine: RandomAffine (degrees, translate, scale)
     - perspective: RandomPerspective (distortion_scale: 0.2)
   - Added corresponding make_transform_from_config branches for
     RandomAffine, RandomRotation, RandomPerspective
